name: Price currency
description: Price currency is the currency in which Price is denominated.
optionalityRules: Price currency is only reported when Price is reported as a monetary amount.
Required if Price notation is 1 and Price currency is required to be reported.
Values are not reported for the not-reported Action types.
valueRules: Where Price is reported as a decimal, its currency is taken to be the same currency as Notional currency—Leg 1.
If reported, the formats of the values conform to the 2024 Rules specifications.
